sentences: The company currently has a vacancy for a senior software engineer. 公司目前有一個高級軟體工程師的空缺。
I'm sorry, but we have no vacancies at the hotel for the coming weekend. 抱歉，我們飯店下週末沒有空房了。
The old office building has been standing vacant for years. 那棟舊辦公大樓已經空置（空缺）多年了。
Are there any vacant seats available on the next bus home? 下一班回家的公車上有空位嗎？

meaning: 透過選擇或驅逐的方式搬出住宅或其他財產。
sentences: I have to vacate my house by midday, as the new owner is moving in. 由於新主人要搬進來，我必須在中午前搬出房子。
You are hereby ordered to vacate the premises within 14 days. 特此命令您在 14 天內搬出該處。
Where are you going for your summer vacation this year? 你今年暑假要去哪裡度假？
I'm looking forward to taking a long vacation after this project. 我期待在專案結束後休個長假。
It is important to vaccinate children against common childhood diseases. 為兒童接種疫苗以預防常見的兒童疾病非常重要。
The health department is encouraging everyone to get vaccinated against the flu. 衛生部門正鼓勵每個人接種流感疫苗。

meaning: 接種疫苗，以預防特定疾病或疾病株。
sentences: The term vaccination refers to inoculation with a vaccine, in order to protect from a particular disease or strain of disease. 術語「疫苗接種」是指接種疫苗，以預防特定疾病或疾病株。
The lesson introduced vaccination as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了疫苗接種這個易於理解的有用術語。
The scientists managed to develop an effective vaccine for the virus.
Regular vaccines are important for protecting children from diseases.
Sound cannot travel through a vacuum because there are no air molecules. 聲音不能在真空中傳播。
She decided to vacuum the entire house before the guests arrived. 她決定在客人到達之前用吸塵器打掃（吸塵）整個房子。

meaning: 膽小鬼；一個弱者；一隻貓。
sentences: The term vagina refers to a coward; a weakling; a pussy. 陰道這個字指的是膽小鬼；一個弱者；一隻小貓。
The lesson introduced vagina as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了陰道這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。

meaning: 屬於陰道、與陰道有關或影響陰道的。
sentences: You may have a vaginal birth, C-section or surrogacy; it's up to you. 您可能進行陰道分娩、剖腹產或代孕；由您決定。
Something described as vaginal is of, relating to, or affecting the vagina. 被描述為陰道的事物屬於陰道、與陰道有關或影響陰道。
His instructions were quite vague, and I wasn't sure what to do next. 他的指令相當模糊（不明確），我不確定接下來該做什麼。
She has a vague memory of visiting the small village when she was a child. 她對小時候去過那個小村莊有著模糊的記憶。
He looked vaguely around the room, as if lost. 他茫然地環顧房間四周，彷彿迷失了方向。
If someone acts vaguely, they do so in a way that is in a vague manner. 如果某人的行為含糊不清，他們就會以含糊的方式這樣做。

meaning: 訪客給僕人的錢；小費；還有淡水河谷。
sentences: The term vail refers to money given to servants by visitors; a gratuity; also vale. “vail”一词指的是访客给仆人的钱；小费；还有淡水河谷。
The lesson introduced vail as a useful term to understand. 本课介绍了 vail 作为一个易于理解的有用术语。
All our efforts to start the car were in vain, so we had to call a taxi. 我們啟動汽車的所有努力都徒勞無功（白費了），所以我們只好叫計程車。
He is so vain that he spends hours looking at himself in the mirror. 他非常虛榮（自負），花好幾個小時對著鏡子看自己。
The lesson introduced vale as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了 vale 作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
Students practiced using vale in class. 學生在課堂上練習使用 vale。

meaning: 收到情人節禮物或收到情人節禮物的人，尤其是在 2 月 14 日。
sentences: Won't you be my valentine? 你願意當我的情人嗎？
The term valentine refers to a person to whom a valentine is given or from whom it is received, especially on February 14th. 情人節一詞指的是收到情人節禮物或收到情人節禮物的人，尤其是在 2 月 14 日。

meaning: 男人的貼身男侍從，負責男人的衣著儀表。
sentences: The term valet refers to a man's personal male attendant, responsible for his clothes and appearance. 貼身男僕一詞是指男士的貼身男侍從，負責男士的衣著和儀表。
The lesson introduced valet as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了代客泊車這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。
The firefighters made a valiant effort to save the building. 消防員付出了英勇的努力來拯救這棟建築。
Despite their valiant struggle, the team lost the game in the final minute. 儘管進行了英勇的奮戰，球隊還是在最後一分鐘輸掉了比賽。
Your passport must be valid for at least six months before you can travel. 您的護照必須至少有六個月的有效期（有效）才能旅行。
He raised several valid points during the discussion about the new project. 在關於新專案的討論中，他提出了幾個正當（合理）的觀點。
The data file cannot be imported because it doesn't validate. 無法匯入資料文件，因為它未驗證。
To validate means to have its validity successfully proven. 驗證意味著成功地證明了其有效性。

meaning: 驗證某事物的東西，例如證書；證明、認證、確認、證據或驗證。
sentences: The term validation refers to something, such as a certificate, that validates something; attestation, authentication, confirmation, proof or verification. 術語「驗證」是指驗證某些內容的事物，例如證書；證明、認證、確認、證據或驗證。
The lesson introduced validation as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了驗證作為一個需要理解的有用術語。

meaning: 有效、真實或真實的狀態。
sentences: The term validity refers to the state of being valid, authentic or genuine. 術語「有效性」是指有效、真實或真實的狀態。
The lesson introduced validity as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了效度這個術語，它是一個需要理解的有用術語。
The small village is nestled in a beautiful and green valley. 那個小村莊坐落在一個美麗翠綠的山谷中。
We took a hot air balloon ride over the spectacular valley. 我們搭乘熱氣球飛越了壯麗的山谷。
The term valor refers to uS standard spelling of valour. 術語 valor 是指美國標準拼法的 valour。
The lesson introduced valor as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了「勇氣」這個術語，它是一個需要理解的有用術語。
He gave me some valuable advice on how to improve my skills. 他給了我一些關於如何提升技能的寶貴建議。
Please keep your valuable items in the hotel's safety deposit box. 請將您的貴重物品放在飯店的保險箱裡。
The term valuation refers to an estimation of something's worth. 估值一詞是指某物的價值的估計。
The lesson introduced valuation as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了估值作為一個需要理解的有用術語。
The value of gold has increased significantly over the years. 金子的價值這些年來顯著增加。
It's important to understand the value of hard work and dedication. 了解努力與奉獻的價值是很重要的。

meaning: 擁有 價值 ， 受人尊敬 。
sentences: She is a highly valued member of the team. 她是團隊中一位 有價值 的成員。 她是團隊中非常有價值的成員。 她是團隊中一位有價值的成員。
The report describes the result as valued. 該報告將結果描述為有價值的。 該報告將結果描述為有價值的。 該報告將結果描述為有價值的。
The plumber replaced the faulty valve to stop the water leak. 水管工更換了故障的閥門以停止漏水。
The heart has several valves that control the flow of blood. 心臟有幾個控制血液流動的瓣膜（活門）。

meaning: 對觀眾而言，延遲或拖延時間。
sentences: Keep vamping! Something’s wrong with the mic! 繼續吸！麥克風有問題！
She went out there to vamp since the speaker was late arriving. 由於演講者遲到了，她就去那裡討好。

meaning: 具有傳統上被認為是吸血鬼的習慣的人，例如恐日症、夜貓子、皮膚蒼白等等。
sentences: Somehow I doubt that Kelly will want to go surfing with us — she's such a vampire that she might recoil from the sun, lol! 不知怎的，我懷疑凱莉會想和我們一起去衝浪——她是個吸血鬼，可能會害怕陽光，哈哈！

The term vampire refers to a person with habits traditionally ascribed to (literal) vampires, such as heliophobia, being a night owl, having pale skin, and so on. 吸血鬼一詞指的是具有傳統上被認為是吸血鬼的習慣的人，例如恐日症、夜貓子、皮膚蒼白等等。
The delivery van arrived early this morning with our new sofa. 送貨貨車今天一早載著我們的新沙發到了。
They decided to rent a large van for their family road trip. 他們決定租一輛大箱型車（貨車）去家庭公路旅行。

meaning: 故意損壞或毀壞任何財產，例如塗鴉或污損。
sentences: As we turned down the street I was appalled by the vandalism: spray paint and smashed windows that were everywhere. 當我們沿著街道拐進時，我對破壞行為感到震驚：到處都是噴漆和破碎的窗戶。
The term vandalism refers to willful damage to or destruction of any property, such as graffiti or defacement. 故意破壞一詞是指故意損壞或破壞任何財產，例如塗鴉或污損。
The weather vane on the roof showed that the wind was blowing from the north. 屋頂上的風向標顯示風是從北方吹來的。
The turbine vane was damaged by debris during the storm. 渦輪機葉片在風暴中被碎片損壞了。

meaning: 陸軍或艦隊前線的領導部隊。
sentences: The term vanguard refers to the leading units at the front of an army or fleet. 先鋒隊一詞是指陸軍或艦隊前線的先導部隊。
The lesson introduced vanguard as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了「先鋒」這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。
She added a few drops of fresh vanilla essence to the cake batter.
The plain design of the apartment was a bit too vanilla for her taste.
The sun suddenly vanished behind a thick layer of dark clouds. 太陽突然消失在一層厚厚的黑雲後面。
His fears managed to vanish as soon as he saw her friendly smile. 他一見到她友好的笑容，恐懼就消失了。
His constant bragging about his achievements showed his great vanity.
She sat at her wooden vanity and applied some moisturizing lotion.

meaning: 視野良好的地方或位置；一個有利的位置。
sentences: The term vantage refers to a place or position affording a good view; a vantage point. 有利一詞是指提供良好視野的地方或位置；一個有利的位置。
The lesson introduced vantage as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了「優勢」這個術語，它是一個易於理解的有用術語。
Water vapor began to rise from the pot of hot water on the stove.
The morning sun caused the dense fog to turn into light water vapor.
The term variability refers to the state or characteristic of being variable. 術語“可變性”是指可變的狀態或特徵。
The lesson introduced variability as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了可變性作為一個需要理解的有用術語。
The results of the experiment depend on several different variables. 實驗結果取決於幾個不同的變數。
The weather in the mountains is very variable and can change quickly. 山區的天氣非常多變（易變的）。

Depending on the variance of the type constructor, the subtyping relation of the simple types may be either preserved, reversed, or ignored for the respective complex types. 根據類型建構函數的變化，對於對應的複雜類型，簡單類型的子類型關係可以被保留、反轉或忽略。
The term variance refers to covariance and contravariance generally. 術語“方差”通常指協方差和逆變。

meaning: 與類型或規格略有不同的東西。
sentences: All breeds of dog are variants of the species “Canis lupus familiaris”. 所有品種的狗都是「犬狼瘡」物種的變種。
The term variant refers to something that is slightly different from a type or norm. 術語變體是指與類型或規範略有不同的事物。
The study found a significant variation in the local dialects of the region. 研究發現該地區的地方方言存在顯著變化。
There are several variations of the classic recipe that you can try. 你可以嘗試經典食譜的幾種不同變體。
The store offers a wide variety of fresh fruit and vegetables. 這家店提供多樣化（種類繁多）的新鮮水果和蔬菜。
Variety is the spice of life, so try to experience new things. 多樣性是生活的調味品，所以試著去體驗新事物。
He has traveled to various countries and seen different cultures. 他曾去過各個（各種各樣的）國家，看過不同的文化。
The study explores the various factors that affect human health. 該研究探索了影響人類健康的各種因素。
My caravan served variously as a changing room, office and bedroom. 我的露營車分別用作更衣室、辦公室和臥室。
The team responded variously to the change. 團隊對這項變化做出了不同的反應。
Apply a layer of varnish to protect the wood from moisture. 塗上一層清漆以保護木頭不受潮。
He spent the afternoon varnishing the new dining table. 他花了一個下午的時間給新餐桌塗漆。

meaning: 代表某個機構（通常是高中、學院或大學）的主要運動隊伍。
sentences: The term varsity refers to the principal sports team representing an institution (usually a high school, college, or university.). 校隊一詞是指代表某個機構（通常是高中、學院或大學）的主要運動隊伍。
The lesson introduced varsity as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了大學作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
The temperatures can vary significantly in this mountain region. 這個山區的氣溫變化可能（各不相同）很大。
Opinions on this controversial issue vary from person to person. 對這個有爭議問題的看法因人而異。
A single red rose stood in a slender glass vase on the table. 一朵紅玫瑰插在桌上細長的玻璃花瓶裡。
Please handle the ancient ceramic vase with extreme care. 請極其小心地處理那個古代陶瓷花瓶。

meaning: 任何直接下屬都受到對上級的這種誓言的約束。
sentences: The king ordered his vassals to join him on the crusade unless they had a written note signed by the archbishop or pope. 國王命令他的封臣加入他的十字軍東徵，除非他們有大主教或教宗簽署的書面照會。
The term vassal refers to Any direct subordinate bound by such vows to a superior. 附庸一詞是指受上級誓言約束的任何直接下屬。
The Sahara Desert is a vast area of sand and rock in northern Africa. 撒哈拉沙漠是非洲北部一片廣闊的沙石地帶。
The project will require a vast amount of money and resources to complete. 該專案將需要大量的資金和資源才能完成。
If someone acts vastly, they do so in a way that is greatly, in a vast manner. 如果某人行動巨大，那麼他們會以一種偉大的方式、以一種巨大的方式這樣做。
The speaker responded vastly during the discussion. 演講者在討論中做出了廣泛的回應。

meaning: 銀行內或下方用於存放貨幣和其他貴重物品的安全房間；其他設置中的類似房間。
sentences: The bank kept their money safe in a large vault. 銀行將他們的錢安全地存放在一個大金庫中。
The term vault refers to the secure room or rooms in or below a bank used to store currency and other valuables; similar rooms in other settings. 金庫一詞是指銀行內或銀行下方用於存放貨幣和其他貴重物品的安全房間；其他設置中的類似房間。
The restaurant is famous for its delicious roast veal. 這家餐廳以其美味的烤小牛肉而聞名。
Veal is meat that comes from young calves. 小牛肉是來自幼牛的肉。

meaning: 有向量，既有大小又有方向；兩點之間的有符號差。
sentences: Velocity is a vector defined by the speed of an object and its direction. 速度是由物體的速度及其方向定義的向量。
Computers store many types of data as vectors for ease of processing. 計算機將多種類型的資料儲存為向量以便於處理。

meaning: 突然改變方向或路線；轉向。
sentences: The car slid on the ice and veered out of control. 汽車在冰上打滑並失去控制。
To veer means to change direction or course suddenly; to swerve. 轉向意味著突然改變方向或航向；轉向。
Fresh vegetables are an important part of a healthy diet. 新鮮蔬菜是健康飲食的重要組成部分。
What is your favorite vegetable? Mine is broccoli. 你最喜歡什麼蔬菜？我的是花椰菜。
She became a vegetarian because she wanted to improve her health and protect animals. 她成為一名素食者，因為她想改善健康並保護動物。
This restaurant offers a wide variety of delicious vegetarian dishes. 這家餐廳提供各式各樣美味的素食菜餚。
There were large amounts of vegetation in the forest. 森林裡有大量的植被。
The term vegetation refers to plants, taken collectively. 植被一詞是指植物的統稱。

meaning: 以激烈的方式；以強烈或有力的態度表達。
sentences: vehemently opposed 強烈反對
If someone acts vehemently, they do so in a way that is in a vehement manner; expressing with a strong or forceful attitude. 如果某人行為激烈，他們就會以激烈的方式這樣做；以強烈或有力的態度表達。
Modern electric vehicles are becoming more popular nowadays. 現代電動車正變得越來越流行。
Using public vehicles is a great way to reduce urban pollution. 使用大眾交通工具是減少城市污染的好方法。

meaning: 屬於或關於一輛或多輛車輛，通常特別指汽車和卡車；涉及車輛。
sentences: vehicular homicide 車輛兇殺案
Ernest had a fear of vehicular travel, and ended up walking everywhere. 歐內斯特（Ernest）害怕乘車旅行，最終到處都是步行。
The bride wore a beautiful white lace veil over her long blonde hair.
A veil of secrecy surrounded the company's new research project.
The nurse carefully looked for a vein in his arm to draw some blood. 護士在他手臂上仔細尋找靜脈（血管）來抽血。
The marble has beautiful blue veins running through it, making it unique. 這塊大理石上有美麗的藍色紋理（脈絡），使其顯得獨一無二。

meaning: 表示位置相對於時間的變化率的向量，將速度與方向分量結合。
sentences: A car racing in a circle may retain the same speed while continually changing its velocity. 繞圈比賽的汽車可能會保持相同的速度，同時不斷改變其速度。
The term velocity refers to a vector quantity that denotes the rate of change of position with respect to time, combining speed with a directional component. 術語「速度」是指表示位置相對於時間的變化率的向量，將速度與方向分量結合。
The luxury sofa was covered with a very soft red velvet fabric.
The cat's shiny coat felt like smooth velvet to the touch yesterday.

meaning: 一種痛苦的、破壞性的世仇，通常發生在兩個家庭、氏族或派系之間，每次傷害或殺戮都會受到報復：血仇。
sentences: The families had been locked in a bitter vendetta for generations. 這些家庭世世代代都深陷苦毒的仇殺之中。

The term vendetta refers to a bitter, destructive feud, normally between two families, clans, or factions, in which each injury or slaying is revenged: a blood feud. 「仇殺」一詞指的是一種痛苦的、破壞性的世仇，通常發生在兩個家庭、氏族或派系之間，每次傷害或殺戮都會被報復：血仇。
The local street vendor sells delicious fresh fruits and snacks every morning. 當地的街頭小販每天早上出售美味的新鮮水果和點心。
The company is looking for a reliable vendor to provide computer equipment. 公司正在尋找一家可靠的供應商來提供電腦設備。
to veneer a piece of furniture with mahogany 用桃花心木貼皮家具
To veneer means to apply veneer to. To veneer 的意思是應用單板。

meaning: 由於年齡、尊嚴、性格或地位而受到尊重。
sentences: Something described as venerable is commanding respect because of age, dignity, character or position. 被描述為令人尊敬的東西是因為年齡、尊嚴、性格或地位而受到尊重。
The word venerable is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 尊敬這個詞常用來形容一個人、一件事或一種情況。

meaning: 對侮辱、傷害或其他錯誤進行報復。
sentences: The term vengeance refers to revenge taken for an insult, injury, or other wrong. 復仇一詞是指因侮辱、傷害或其他錯誤而進行的報復。
The lesson introduced vengeance as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了復仇這個有用的術語，需要理解。
His chains now broken, the prisoner turned a vengeful eye toward his former captors. 現在，他的鎖鏈掙脫了，囚犯將復仇的目光投向了以前的俘虜。
The report describes the result as vengeful. 報告稱這項結果是報復性的。

meaning: 帶有怨恨或惡意的情緒或言語；硫酸。
sentences: The term venom refers to feeling or speech marked by spite or malice; vitriol. 「毒液」一詞指的是帶有怨恨或惡意的感情或言語。礬。
The lesson introduced venom as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了毒液作為一個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 構成威脅；危險的，有威脅的。可惡;惡性；惡意的。
sentences: His attitude toward me is utterly venomous. 他對我的態度非常惡毒。
The report describes the result as venomous. 報告稱這一結果是有毒的。
Her venous circulation was poor, leading to varicose veins. 她的靜脈循環不好，導致靜脈曲張。
The report describes the result as venous. 報告將結果描述為靜脈。
Fresh air enters the room through a small vent in the wall. 新鮮空氣透過牆上的一個小通風口進入房間。
He needed to vent his frustration after a difficult day at work. 在工作艱辛的一天後，他需要發洩一下挫折感。

meaning: 身體呼吸的過程；吸入空氣提供氧氣，呼出廢氣去除二氧化碳。
sentences: This toxin impairs ventilation by causing inflammation in the bronchioles. 這種毒素會引起細支氣管炎症，進而損害通氣。
The term ventilation refers to the bodily process of breathing; the inhalation of air to provide oxygen, and the exhalation of spent air to remove carbon dioxide. 通氣一詞是指身體的呼吸過程。吸入空氣以提供氧氣，呼出廢氣以去除二氧化碳。
Something described as ventral is related to the abdomen or stomach. 被描述为腹侧的东西与腹部或胃有关。
The word ventral is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 腹侧这个词经常用来描述人、事物或情况。

The city center is an ideal venue for the upcoming international summit. 市中心是即將舉行的國際峰會的理想會場（地點）。
The band is looking for a larger venue for their next concert tonight. 樂隊正在為今晚的下一場音樂會尋找一個更大的場地。
The term vera refers to a skin (rolling paper for cigarettes). 維拉一詞指的是皮膚（香菸的捲紙）。
The lesson introduced vera as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了維拉作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
We spent the evening sitting on the veranda, enjoying the breeze. 我們那天晚上坐在陽台上吹風。
The old house has a large wooden veranda that overlooks the garden. 那棟舊房子有一個可以俯瞰花園的大型木製走廊。
A verb is a word that describes an action or a state. 動詞是描述動作或狀態的詞。
In the sentence 'She runs quickly', 'runs' is the main verb. 在「她跑很快」這個句子中，「跑」是主要動詞。
The two parties reached a verbal agreement before signing the contract. 雙方在簽署合約前達成了一項口頭協議。
She is highly articulate and has excellent verbal communication skills. 她口才流利，具備出色的言辭（口頭）溝通技巧。

meaning: 以口頭方式；用言語；透過說話。
sentences: Dumbstruck with joy, she was unable to express herself verbally, but the gratitude in her face was evident to all. 她高興得目瞪口呆，無法用言語表達，但臉上的感激之情卻是有目共睹。
If someone acts verbally, they do so in a way that is in a verbal manner; with words; by speaking. 如果某人以口頭方式行事，那麼他們就是以口頭方式這樣做的；用言語；透過說話。

meaning: 逐字;與原先使用的字完全相同。
sentences: I have copied his speech verbatim, so this is exactly what he said, word for word. 我 逐字複製了他的演講 ，所以這正是他所說的，逐字逐句的。 我逐字複製了他的演講，所以這就是他所說的，一字不差。 我逐字複製了他的演講，所以這就是他所說的，逐字逐句的。

The report describes the result as verdant. 報告將結果描述為翠綠。
Everyone noticed the verdant tone of the message. 每個人都注意到了這則訊息的青翠語氣。
The jury reached a unanimous verdict of not guilty after several hours. 經過數小時後，陪審團一致裁定（判決）無罪。
We are still waiting for the final verdict on the legality of the new policy. 我們仍在等待關於新政策合法性的最後裁定。

meaning: 非常接近或非常接近；到邊界；接近。
sentences: Eating blowfish verges on insanity. 吃河豚近乎瘋狂。
To verge means to be or come very close; to border; to approach. To verge意味著非常接近或非常接近；到邊界；接近。
Do you have verifiable evidence to support that claim? 您有可驗證的證據來支持這項說法嗎？
The report describes the result as verifiable. 報告稱該結果是可驗證的。
The detective needs verification of your whereabouts last night. 偵探需要核實你昨晚的行蹤。
The term verification refers to confirmation; authentication. 驗證一詞是指確認；驗證。

meaning: 證實或證明某事的真實性。
sentences: To verify means to substantiate or prove the truth of something. 驗證意味著證實或證明某事的真實性。

A fair is a veritable smorgasbord. 博覽會是名副其實的大雜燴。

sentences: The area was crawling with all sorts of vermin: fleas, lice, mice, and rats to name a few. Thus, we felt as if vermin were crawling over us. 該地區爬滿了各種害蟲：跳蚤、蝨子、老鼠等等。因此，我們感覺好像害蟲在我們身上爬行。
The term vermin refers to Any of various common types of small insects or other animals which cause harm and annoyance. 害蟲一詞是指造成傷害和煩惱的各種常見類型的小昆蟲或其他動物。

meaning: 屬於出生國；與生俱來或天生的。
sentences: a vernacular disease 鄉土病
Something described as vernacular is belonging to the country of one's birth; one's own by birth or by nature. 被描述為白話文的東西屬於一個人的出生國；一個人天生或天生的。
She is a very versatile artist who can both paint and play music.

meaning: 多才多藝或具有多種不同能力的屬性。

meaning: 椎骨。構成脊椎的一塊骨頭。
sentences: A single vertebra helps form the spinal column. 一塊椎骨共同組成脊柱。
The scan showed a small fracture in one vertebra. 掃描顯示其中一塊椎骨有輕微骨裂。

meaning: 椎骨（複數）。構成脊椎的一系列骨頭。
sentences: The vertebrae protect the spinal cord and support the body. 椎骨保護脊髓並支撐身體。
Poor posture can place extra pressure on the vertebrae. 姿勢不良可能會讓椎骨承受額外壓力。

meaning: 某物的最高點、頂部或頂點。
sentences: The mountain’s vertex was covered in snow. 山頂被雪覆蓋了。

If someone acts vertically, they do so in a way that is in a vertical direction or position. 如果某人垂直行動，他們會以垂直方向或垂直位置的方式這樣做。

meaning: 精神失調或不平衡的狀態或類似身體眩暈的情況；精神頭暈或頭暈。
sentences: The term vertigo refers to a disordered or imbalanced state of mind or things analogous to physical vertigo; mental giddiness or dizziness. 眩暈一詞是指精神失調或不平衡的狀態或類似身體眩暈的事物；精神頭暈或頭暈。

sentences: The term vestibule refers to The part of the left ventricle below the aortic orifice. 前庭一詞是指 心室 位於 主動脈 主動脈 <a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="/tle/wikiorificor 的部分。 術語前庭是指主動脈口下方的左心室部分。 前庭是指心室位於主動脈主動脈<a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="/tle/wikiorificor 的部位。

She dreamed of becoming a veterinarian and helping animals as a child.

meaning: 屬於或涉及非人類動物（尤其是家養動物和農場動物）的醫療或手術治療。
sentences: Max used all his veterinary knowledge to save the goose stuck in the fence. 馬克斯運用他所有的獸醫知識來拯救被困在柵欄裡的鵝。

Something described as veterinary is of or relating to the medical or surgical treatment of non-human animals, especially domestic and farm animals. Something described as veterinary is of 或 relating to the medical or surgical treatment of non-human animals, especially domestic and farm animals.

The manager has the power to veto any decision made by the team.
I'll send you the documents via email as soon as I finish the report. 我一寫完報告就會通過（經由）電子郵件把文件寄給你。

meaning: 具有生存能力的屬性；生存或成功的能力。

sentences: He has a vibrant personality. 他個性充滿活力。

meaning: 振動或引起振動的裝置。用於按摩或性刺激的振動裝置。

meaning: 在英格蘭教會中，教區的牧師領取薪水或津貼，但不領取什一稅。
sentences: The term vicar refers to in the Church of England, the priest of a parish, receiving a salary or stipend but not tithes. 在英國教會中，牧師一詞指的是教區的牧師，領取薪水或津貼，但不領取什一稅。

sentences: Ireland was governed by a Viceroy representing the English King/Queen when it was part of the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Ireland. 當愛爾蘭是大不列顛及愛爾蘭聯合王國的一部分時，愛爾蘭由代表英國國王/女王的總督統治。
The term viceroy refers to one who governs a country, province, or colony as the representative of a monarch. 總督一詞是指作為君主代表統治一個國家、省份或殖民地的人。

The police searched the entire vicinity for the missing child. 警方在整個鄰近地區搜尋失蹤的孩子。

meaning: 以惡毒的方式；兇猛地或惡意地。
sentences: The team responded viciously to the change. 該團隊對這一變化做出了惡毒的反應。
She handled the problem viciously during the meeting. 她在會議期間惡毒地處理了這個問題。
The charity organization provides help to victims of disaster. 慈善組織為災難受害者提供幫助。
He was the innocent victim of a serious financial scam. 他是一場嚴重金融詐騙的無辜受害者。
The home team was the proud victor at the end of the final match.
History is often written by the victors of the major international conflicts.

meaning: 屬於或表達勝利或勝利的感覺。
sentences: The team were met with a victorious cheer. 球隊迎來了勝利的歡呼聲。
The report describes the result as victorious. 報告稱這一結果是勝利的。

Could you please send me the link to the instructional video? 你可以把教學影片的連結寄給我嗎？
The hotel room offers a magnificent view of the entire ocean. 飯店房間提供了壯闊的全海景。
In my view, we should focus more on improving product quality. 在我看來，我們應該更專注於提升產品品質。

The museum's online tour provides a unique experience for digital viewers. 博物館的線上導覽為數位觀眾提供了獨特的體驗。
The author presents the story from several different viewpoints. 作者從幾個不同的角度（觀點）展現了故事。
It is important to consider the problem from a global viewpoint. 從全球視角（觀點）來考慮這個問題非常重要。

meaning: 任何時間的觀察或監視期。
sentences: His dog kept vigil outside the hospital for eight days while he was recovering from an accident. 在他從事故中恢復期間，他的狗在醫院外守夜了八天。
The term vigil refers to a period of observation or surveillance at any hour. 「守夜」一詞是指在任何時間進行觀察或監視的一段時間。

meaning: 一名警衛；一個準備觀看的人。
sentences: The term vigilance refers to a guard; a person set to watch. 「警惕」這個字是指守衛；一個準備觀看的人。

meaning: 保持警惕，尤其是對於危險或混亂；警報;警惕的。
sentences: Be vigilant for signs of disease in your garden. 警惕花園中的疾病跡象。

The term vigilante refers to a member of a vigilance committee. 治安維持者一詞指的是治安委員會的成員。

She enjoys going for a vigorous run in the park every morning to stay fit. 她喜歡每天早上在公園進行劇烈的跑步運動以保持健康。

meaning: 具有強烈的能量、力量或活力。
sentences: The lawyer vigorously defended her client. 律師極力為她的委託人辯護。
He knocked vigorously on the door. 他用力地敲門。
The weather today is absolutely vile; it hasn't stopped raining. 今天的天氣簡直糟透了，雨一直下個不停。
He was accused of committing a vile crime against the community. 他被指控對社區犯下了卑鄙的罪行。
They stayed in a beautiful seaside villa during their summer holiday. 他們在暑假期間住在一座美麗的海濱別墅裡。
The wealthy billionaire owns a magnificent villa in the south of France. 那位富有億萬富翁在法國南部擁有一座壯麗的豪宅（別墅）。
They live in a quiet and peaceful small village in the countryside. 他們住在鄉下一個安靜祥和的小村莊裡。

meaning: 賭博遊戲（尤其是滾球遊戲）中的受害者或受騙者。
